lineup_source: New Zealand 1-3 Egypt, Group G, 21 June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Max Crocombe
players.note: Born in Auckland of Cook Islands descent (a NZ realm territory, not a foreign nationality); no documented foreign-born parent.

players.name: Tim Payne
players.note: Born and raised in Auckland, attended Sacred Heart College; no documented foreign parental heritage.

players.name: Finn Surman
players.note: Born in Cardiff, Wales, but grew up in Prebbleton, Canterbury and came through New Zealand youth football; no documented foreign-born parent despite Welsh birthplace.

players.name: Michael Boxall
players.note: Born in Auckland; documented as being of Samoan heritage, though parents are not individually distinguished in sources.

players.name: Liberato Cacace
players.note: Born in Wellington to an Italian father, Antonio, who emigrated from Massa Lubrense near Naples in 1992, and a New Zealand mother of Italian descent.

players.name: Joe Bell
players.note: Born in Bristol, England to English parents Richard and Caroline Bell, family moved to New Zealand in his early childhood; holds dual citizenship.

players.name: Marko Stamenić
players.note: Born in Wellington to a Serbian father from Novi Sad and a Samoan mother.

players.name: Callum McCowatt
players.note: Born in Auckland; no documented foreign parental heritage found.

players.name: Sarpreet Singh
players.note: Born in Auckland to Indian (Punjabi) immigrant parents.

players.name: Elijah Just
players.note: Born in New Zealand to a German father and a Chinese mother.

players.name: Chris Wood
players.note: Born in Auckland to Grant and Julie Wood; his mother is from England, captains the All Whites and is the team's record scorer.
